description_long: This festive kiosk is designed to resemble a small holiday-themed house, featuring a gabled red roof with a blue chimney and decorative snowflakes. The front facade displays a Coca-Cola logo above a faux fireplace, flanked by two stylized Christmas trees made of stacked red and black elements. To the right, a display rack holds rows of Coca-Cola bottles, and a large holiday mural with Santa Claus and reindeer decorates the side wall. The rear of the kiosk features another mural with Santa in his sleigh, and several colorful signposts and candy canes are positioned around the structure. The overall design is vibrant and inviting, with a strong holiday and Coca-Cola branding presence.
description: A festive Coca-Cola holiday kiosk styled as a small house, with red roof, Christmas trees, bottle displays, and Santa-themed murals.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, Coca-Cola logo, faux fireplace, bottle display, and two large Christmas trees.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the depth of the kiosk, the blue chimney, and a cluster of signposts and candy canes.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights a large mural of Santa in his sleigh, four colorful candy canes, and the backs of the Christmas trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the roof, chimney, and additional Christmas trees, with signposts visible along the side.
attribute_signage_type: Printed and logo signage; Coca-Cola logo above entrance and on side mural, integrated into structure.
attribute_window_presence: One rectangular window on the front facade, left side.
attribute_door_configuration: Single open archway at the front center.
attribute_roof_design: Gabled roof with red panels, blue chimney, and decorative snowflakes; moderate overhang.
attribute_architectural_style: Festive rustic with holiday and commercial branding influences.
